name: How is fault decided in warehouse accidents with multiple parties?

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in warehouse accidents with multiple parties?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp ignores fault; for lawsuits, negligence per state law apportions liability.** Proximate cause key, as in UPS cases.[2] Key factors: safety regs violations; witness testimony. Investigate contractors/equipment; comparative fault reduces award. Expert reconstruction helps.[2]
